mapper.sql: sc.id, sc.exam_id, sc.paper_id, sc.candidate_id, sc.total_score, sc.objective_score, sc.subjective_score, sc.`rank`, sc.submit_time, sc.create_time, sc.update_time, e.name as exam_name, p.name as paper_name, c.name as candidate_name
mapper.select: select from score sc left join exam e on sc.exam_id = e.id left join paper p on sc.paper_id = p.id left join candidate c on sc.candidate_id = c.id where sc.id = #{id}
select from score sc left join exam e on sc.exam_id = e.id left join paper p on sc.paper_id = p.id left join candidate c on sc.candidate_id = c.id order by sc.create_time desc

select from score sc left join exam e on sc.exam_id = e.id left join paper p on sc.paper_id = p.id left join candidate c on sc.candidate_id = c.id where sc.exam_id = #{examId} order by sc.total_score desc

select from score sc left join exam e on sc.exam_id = e.id left join paper p on sc.paper_id = p.id left join candidate c on sc.candidate_id = c.id where sc.candidate_id = #{candidateId} order by sc.create_time desc

select from score sc left join exam e on sc.exam_id = e.id left join paper p on sc.paper_id = p.id left join candidate c on sc.candidate_id = c.id where sc.exam_id = #{examId} and sc.candidate_id = #{candidateId}
mapper.insert: insert into score(exam_id, paper_id, candidate_id, total_score, objective_score, subjective_score, `rank`, submit_time) values(#{examId}, #{paperId}, #{candidateId}, #{totalScore}, #{objectiveScore}, #{subjectiveScore}, #{rank}, #{submitTime})
mapper.delete:
delete from score where id in
#{id}
